import { ReadableStream } from 'node:stream/web'; import { Readable } from 'node:stream'; import { AnyRouter } from '../router.cjs'; export declare function transformReadableStreamWithRouter(router: AnyRouter, routerStream: ReadableStream): ReadableStream<any>; export declare function transformPipeableStreamWithRouter(router: AnyRouter, routerStream: Readable): Readable; export declare function transformStreamWithRouter(router: AnyRouter, appStream: ReadableStream, opts?: { /** Timeout for serialization to complete after app render finishes (default: 60000ms) */ timeoutMs?: number; /** Maximum lifetime of the stream transform (default: 60000ms). Safety net for cleanup. */ lifetimeMs?: number; }): ReadableStream<any>;
